message:
test(init): add unit tests for --auto project-pack detection

Add 17 tests covering the init --auto feature from 0d27671:

- CLI parsing: --auto, --dry-run, --auto with --project-dir
- detect_project_packs: empty dir, Dockerfile, docker-compose,
  Terraform, GitHub Actions, Kubernetes/Helm, database deps from
  package.json, AWS (serverless.yml), GCP (cloudbuild.yaml)
- Deduplication: multiple Docker-related files yield one entry
- generate_config_with_packs: output contains pack IDs and header

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
